hooks.command: bash scripts/qubetalk-claude.sh send --thread dev-exec --title "Claude Code session started" --body "Agent session started on branch $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" --severity info 2>/dev/null || true
bash scripts/qubetalk-claude.sh send --thread dev-exec --title "Claude Code session stopped" --body "Agent session ended" --severity info 2>/dev/null || true
